name: @usebruno/registry-server
description: Read-optimized projection of the git-canonical OpenCollection registry, plus an advisory install-count event log. Postgres is a cache, not the system of record: the projection tables rebuild from git at any time; only the measured install events persist.

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it registry-pg psql -U registry -d registry
scripts.demo: docker compose up -d && node scripts/rebuild.mjs && node src/server.mjs
